home_subtitle: Builder to the core. Software engineer.
page_about_text:
I'm Marc Quel, from Barcelona. I build software. My dev name is marcdshark (Marc D. Shark) — partly because I've been following One Piece since I was a kid, and partly because my colleagues at the office started calling me that for some reason I still don't fully understand.

Currently working at Morescope, where we help companies decarbonize their businesses with AI.

I see all the latest AI developments as a huge wave that is going to hit the coast at some point, and when that happens I'd rather be surfing it than getting crashed by it. I follow the latest AI developments day to day and bring them into my workflows. I'm really interested in exploring and developing the new financial primitives that AI is opening up.
project_draco_description:
A decentralized lottery system built on the Solana blockchain.

Built for pure exploration. No presale, no profit.
